description_long: This is a rectangular, horizontally-oriented stereo sound system with a black wood-textured exterior. The front face features four large, circular copper-colored speaker cones and a central square horn tweeter, all set within a matte black frame. The rear side includes a recessed connection panel with visible terminals and a rectangular port for airflow, as well as a small metallic label. The top, bottom, and sides are smooth and unadorned, showcasing the wood grain pattern. The overall design is modern and robust, suitable for placement in home theaters, entertainment centers, or urban garages. The object appears solid and well-constructed, with no visible control panel or display screen.
description: A black, wood-textured stereo sound system with four copper-colored speakers and a central horn tweeter on the front, and connection ports on the back.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a plain, black wood-textured surface with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view displays four copper-colored speaker cones and a central horn tweeter, all framed in black.
description_view_2: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, black wood-textured surface.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a recessed connection panel, a rectangular port, and a small metallic label, with the rest of the surface being plain black wood texture.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic label on the rear, left of the port, with unreadable text.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: No grille is visible; the speaker cones and tweeter are exposed.
